instruction:
A rod Ab of length 15 cm rests in between two coordinate axes in such a way that the end point A lies on x-axis and ens point B lies on y-axis. A point P(x, y) is taken on the rod in such a way that AP = 6 cm. The locus of P is

Options:
A. a parabola
B. an ellipse
C. a circle
D. a hyperbola
E. hyperbola
